heading: Required Access
body:
To [add](adf-add-query-limits), [edit](adf-edit-query-limits), or [delete](adf-delete-query-limits)
query limits, you must have [Project Owner](<Project Owner>) access to the
project. Users with [Organization Owner](<Organization Owner>) access must add
themselves as a `Project Owner` to the project before adding, editing,
or deleting query limits.

To [view](adf-view-query-limits) limits on queries, you must have
[Project Read Only](<Project Read Only>) access to the project or higher.
